strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise across product and platform work
Hands-on AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) — directly matches a rare requirement
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored test frameworks, ran testing workshops and courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned despite it being in the primary stack
Kotlin/Java exposure is dated and thin (listed skill, robotics work in 2016-2018); no Python evidence
React appears in only one role; frontend history leans heavily on Ember.js
response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with strong TypeScript/Node.js backend and platform experience, MongoDB/SQL, Docker/Kubernetes, AWS exposure, and a demonstrated testing and craftsmanship focus that fits an internal tooling team. The AI agent development experience is an uncommon and explicitly required skill he clearly has. Gaps are framework-specific rather than fundamental: Nest.js is absent, React exposure is lighter than Ember, and Kotlin/Java/Python evidence is thin — all learnable given his track record across many languages and stacks.
